COMMENTS

Who We Are

ABOUT WOLF'S GARAGE

A Portland-built brand for the working-class hot rod community. Honest tools, real culture, no fluff. The mission is the star, not the founder.

THE MISSION

Wolf's Garage is built for the people keeping car and truck culture alive, and the ones ready to jump back in. Right now, the work starts with shirts, stickers, the website, and the data needed to connect builders, shops, and local gearheads. Every shirt helps fund the next step.

THE FUTURE

Phase one: sell shirts to fund the website and keep the lights on. Phase two: fund the tool line. Phase three is the one that matters: a real shop space. Community outreach. Youth workshops. Adult workshops. Summer camps. Guided practice for anybody who wants to learn how to build something with their hands. That's where this is going.

THE COMMUNITY

Hot rod culture doesn't belong to shops and fabricators alone. It belongs to every person who wrenches, builds, and breathes this stuff, including the ones running flower shops, barbershops, and bakeries. The directory exists to keep money inside the community and connect people who would never have found each other otherwise. Your shop. Your people. Your culture.

"Keeping car culture going strong. So that the youth will be ready when it's time to pass the keys."
Public Notices

POST A BULLETIN

Coming Summer 2027

THE TOOL LINE

Everything starts with the people, not the product.

That's the whole point of this place. The directory, the list, the shows, the day-to-day connections between rodders who'd otherwise never cross paths. That comes first. Always.

The tools? Those'll come. We're still messing with them, still figuring out what's actually worth building, and we're in no rush. Good stuff takes time. For now, just come hang. Use the site, poke around, get comfortable. Build this with us and the rest takes care of itself.

Coming Summer 2027. Get Back in the Garage.

Phase three depends on it.

First dibs on drops. Event reminders. Inside scoops. Swag discounts. Nothing else.
